translated: And the magicians did likewise, and frogs came up on Pharaoh's land, but they could not remove the frogs.

ref: and had the cook put to death. Everything happened just as Joseph had said it would,
text: ka yul onɛ aan o bodobodo maannib kpɛɛm la nwɛnɛ Josef n da pa'ali ba zaansʋŋ la gbin si'em la.
translated: And he told them that his many brothers and Joseph had done evil to them in the past.
